name: osint-agent-skills-tools
description: MCP-format tool catalog for OSINT Agent Skills. These tools can be loaded directly into Claude Code, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible agent. Each tool is defined in the Model Context Protocol tool schema with input_schema for structured invocation.

tools.name: dns_lookup
tools.description: Resolve DNS records for a domain using Google's DoH resolver. Returns A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, CNAME, SOA, PTR, CAA, or SRV records as structured JSON. Use this as the default DNS lookup tool — it requires no API key.

domain.description: Target domain (e.g., example.com). Lowercase, no trailing dot.

tools.name: rdap_lookup_domain
tools.description: Look up structured registration data for a domain via RDAP. Returns registrar, registration date, expiry, name servers, and abuse contacts as JSON.

tools.name: rdap_lookup_ip
tools.description: Look up network registration data for an IP address via RDAP. Returns network CIDR, ASN, holder name, country, and abuse contacts.

tools.name: crt_sh_search
tools.description: Search Certificate Transparency logs for certificates issued for a domain. Use wildcard %.example.com to enumerate subdomains. Returns issuer, serial, validity window, and SAN entries.

domain.description: Target domain. Use %.example.com for wildcard subdomain search.

tools.name: wayback_cdx
tools.description: Query the Internet Archive's CDX index for historical snapshots of a URL. Returns list of (timestamp, original URL, status code, MIME type) tuples. Useful for recovering deleted content and tracking changes over time.

collapse.description: Field to collapse on (default: digest, dedupes identical content).

tools.name: wayback_save
tools.description: Trigger a Wayback Machine snapshot of a URL. Use to preserve evidence at the time of investigation.

tools.name: shodan_internetdb
tools.description: Look up the public Shodan profile of an IP — returns hostnames, open ports, CVE list, and tags. No API key required; less detailed than the paid Shodan API.

tools.name: ipinfo_lookup
tools.description: Look up geolocation, ASN, and hosting metadata for an IP via ipinfo.io free tier. Returns city, region, country, org (ASN + holder name), and hostname.

tools.name: bgpview_asn
tools.description: Look up ASN details — holder name, country, RIR, route prefixes, and upstream peers.

asn.description: AS number as digits (e.g., 15169) or AS15169 form.

tools.name: github_user_lookup
tools.description: Look up a GitHub user's public profile — name, bio, location, email (if public), avatar, account creation date, repository count.

tools.name: github_code_search
tools.description: Search public GitHub code for keywords. Useful for finding leaked credentials, internal documentation, or references to a target. Severe rate limit without authentication.

annotations.rate_limit: 10 req/min unauthenticated; 30 req/min with free token

tools.name: urlscan_search
tools.description: Search urlscan.io public scans for a domain, IP, or URL. Returns recent scan results with page DOM, screenshots (if available), and detected technologies.

tools.name: alienvault_otx_lookup
tools.description: Look up an indicator (domain, IP, hostname, URL, email, hash) in AlienVault OTX. Returns related pulses, threat actors, and other indicators linked by the community.

tools.name: hibp_breach_check
tools.description: Check whether an email appears in any HaveIBeenPwned breach. Free endpoint returns breach list (paid key required for breach names as of recent HIBP changes). NEVER use breach credentials to attempt login — that crosses from OSINT into intrusion.

api_key.description: HIBP API key (required for breach name listing).

tools.name: gravatar_lookup
tools.description: Look up a Gravatar profile from an email address (MD5 hashed). Returns avatar URL, profile name, and links to other platforms if the user has linked them.

email.description: Email address to hash and look up.

tools.name: virustotal_domain_report
tools.description: Look up a domain in VirusTotal. Returns detections, passive DNS records, related URLs, and historical categorizations. Free public API: 4 req/min, 500 req/day.

tools.name: shodan_host_lookup
tools.description: Look up full Shodan host data — banners, services, vulnerabilities, hostnames, tags. Requires Shodan API key.

tools.name: securitytrails_history
tools.description: Look up historical DNS records for a domain via SecurityTrails. Returns A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT history with timestamps. Useful for tracking infrastructure changes.

record_type.description: DNS record type to retrieve history for.

tools.name: hunter_email_finder
tools.description: Find email addresses associated with a domain via Hunter.io. Returns candidate emails with confidence scores and sources.

tools.name: nominatim_geocode
tools.description: Forward geocode an address or place name using OpenStreetMap Nominatim. Returns lat/long with bounding box. Strict 1 req/sec rate limit; must identify with User-Agent.

tools.name: blockchain_address_lookup
tools.description: Look up Bitcoin address balance and transactions via Blockchain.com. Free, no key.

tools.name: etherscan_address_lookup
tools.description: Look up Ethereum address transactions via Etherscan free API. Returns normal transactions, internal transactions, ERC-20 transfers, and ERC-721 transfers.

tools.name: mastodon_user_lookup
tools.description: Look up a Mastodon user by handle across the fediverse. Returns account ID, display name, bio, avatar, follower counts, and creation date.

metadata.author: Frangel Raúl Crespo Barrera
metadata.note: Tools listed here are the subset that map cleanly to MCP input_schema format. For CLI tools (sherlock, holehe, theHarvester, etc.) see cli-tools.yaml — those are invoked as subprocesses rather than HTTP calls.
